summary: Iteration 2 closed: Event Discovery Filters + Attendee Profile Links delivered. 50/50 acceptance criteria verified. 22 unit tests pass. 0 new lint violations. PR approved by tech_lead. Ready for merge to main.

evidence: docs/handoffs/qa.md — test catalog, 56 test cases mapped to ACs
docs/handoffs/tech_lead.md — PR review verdict: APPROVED (2 blocking issues fixed)

metrics.widget_tests_deferred_reason: pre-existing maintenance code compilation errors (not caused by iter-2)

stories.title: Event List Filters
stories.notes: Backend filter params (type, dateFrom, dateTo, city) + Prisma WHERE logic. Frontend EventsCubit wired. Filter badge + clear button UI.

stories.title: Clear Filters
stories.notes: EventsCubit.clearFilters() resets state and re-fetches. Badge hides, empty state message reverts.

stories.title: Attendee Profile Navigation
stories.notes: RiderProfilePage (read-only), GetUserByIdUseCase, route registered, attendee list tap navigation, all ResultState branches rendered.
